title: Vampire bunny origin
description: Adds the vampire bunny origin. Play around your blood and hunger bar, with four active skills, double jump, and the ability to defy death. Also adds related items like blood bottle, wooden stakes and a cross.
body:
# Content
## Passive
### Bunnykin
- You can quadruple jump (depends on hunger and blood status), see in the dark, and run really fast.
### Vampirism
- You can only gain hunger by drinking blood or eating bloody food. 
- Being at high hunger gives you various buffs, being low on hunger will severely weaken you.
- You can sneak to disable knockback on your attacks.
### Blood gland
- You can store up to 200 points of blood, which can be used to regain hunger and refilled by attacking alive mobs, especially humanoids. The more damage you deal, the more blood you get.
### Vampiric aura
- You're too fancy to wear armor.
### Undead
- You're undead. Burn in sunlight, take double damage from fire, and is weak to smite.
- At least mobs won't target you
- (Potential incompatibility with other origins, uses a team called "hostile". If this causes issues, either remove the power or dm me on discord and I'll fix it.)
### Soft feet
- You're immune to fall damage and won't trigger sculk sensors
### Demonic
- You take double damage from piercing crossbows and is weak to holy water and other anti-vampire weapons.
### Survival instinct
- Taking lethal damage drains all your blood and gives you emergency healing and resistance.
- Costs 50 points of blood. 
- Certain vampire-killing weapons will bypass this.
## Active
### Replenish (Primary)
- Exchange some blood for hunger and saturation.
### Blood dash (Secondary)
- Costs 30 points of blood.
- Dash a short distance. Very low cooldown.
### Cloak (Ternary)
- Become an intangible cloud of smoke and gain flight.
- Complete immunity and ignore sunlight, but won't be able to interact with the world.
- Entities you move through will become blinded.
- Drains 6 points of blood per second.
### Shroud (Quaternary)
- Costs 70 points of blood.
- Summon a cloud of smoke that, after a small delay, damage and debuff all alive entities inside, while highlighting them for you.
# Final notes
- Join the discord to report bugs and give suggestions.
